name: chr1_1q42_GPR50_ARID2_LCR
description: 1q42 SD module around GPR50, COG2 and AKT3-distal sequence; harbours low-copy repeats that mediate occasional 1q42 microdeletion/microduplication events overlapping the DISC1 region.

architecture.internal_structure: Two SD blocks of 20-50 kb at ~94% identity flanking a unique interval containing GPR50, DISC1-distal, COG2.
